---
title: "“Female Education.”"
---

## “Female Education.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1866
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Christian Remembrancer</i> Vol 51 (Jan. 1866): 21-49

### Notes

Review of <i>Principles of Education, drawn from Nature and Revelation and applied to Female Education in the Upper Classes</i> by Elizabeth Missing Sewell (1865). Identified in letter (20-03-1869) to Alexander Macmillan, MS British Library Add MSS 54920: 227-8

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
